introSection: Salama is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Linnanmäki in Helsinki, Uusimaa, Finland. Salama is Finnish for Lightning.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Riders sit back to back, facing away from each other.

fullText:
Salama is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Linnanmäki in Helsinki, Uusimaa, Finland. Salama is Finnish for Lightning.



Riders sit back to back, facing away from each other.
